---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for NEXUS Visual Weaver
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered?

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — Critical (blocks core functionality)
- [ ] P1 — Important (significant improvement)
- [ ] P2 — Nice to have (quality of life)

## Technical Notes

Any technical considerations:
- Which Modal apps need changes?
- Which API routes are affected?
- Which UI components need updates?
- Credit/cost implications?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
